title: Next button
scenario: Onboarding flow Next button advances from Step 1 through Step 5 to the correct subsequent screens
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing data).
Observe the onboarding flow starting on Step 1 (first screen).
Tap the Next button on Step 1.
Verify the app advances to Step 2 (second screen).
Tap the Next button on Step 2.
Verify the app advances to Step 3 (third screen).
Tap the Next button on Step 3.
Verify the app advances to Step 4 (fourth screen).
Tap the Next button on Step 4.
Verify the app advances to Step 5 (fifth screen).
Tap the Next button on Step 5.
Verify the app advances to the final screen (sixth screen, e.g., Home screen or completion screen).
expected: Tapping the Next button on each onboarding screen (Step 1 through Step 5) correctly advances to the subsequent screen (Step 2, Step 3, Step 4, Step 5, and the final screen respectively).
